Fractions

sizes. She says that 
of one of her chocolates is bigger than

When can we say that

To compare two fractions of two wholes, the wholes from which the
fractions are derived must be the same.

of parathas he made.

paratha. How many parathas did she eat?

Apply knowledge from this chapter to real-world situations
Recall important terms and definitions from Fractions
